messages.content: ok I’m doing it. Don’t say a WORD to Tomás.
Wait WHAT?? The anniversary trip?! 🎉
yes. Lisbon. I’ve been going back and forth for weeks but I decided tonight. I’m booking flights for June, our 35th
Ana!! Lisbon is PERFECT. He is going to absolutely lose his mind. How can I help??
sí hermana
I need your help with the itinerary. You and Marco went a few years ago right? I just need to keep everything off our shared accounts and off the joint credit card
Yes we went in 2023! I have so many recommendations. And don’t worry, your secret is safe with me hermana ❤️
ok so Kayak just sent me a price alert. TAP Air Portugal has roundtrip Denver to Lisbon for $487 a person. That’s really good right??
That’s a great price!! TAP is the Portuguese national airline, they’re good. Book it before it goes up!
omw
I BOOKED IT. 2 roundtrip tickets, Denver to Lisbon, June 10 through 22. Twelve days. My hands are literally shaking
THIS IS GOING TO BE AMAZING 🎉🎉 Ok we need to plan everything. Hotel, day trips, restaurants. I’m so excited for you two!!
hotel is booked too. Hotel Pessoa Lisboa in the Alfama district. The reviews are beautiful and it’s walkable to everything

Alfama is the best neighborhood to stay in! Ok so here are my top recommendations:

1. Day trip to Sintra. The palaces are unbelievable. There’s a tour that includes Cabo da Roca, the westernmost point of mainland Europe. Tomás would love that.

2. Fado restaurant in Alfama. The live music is so special.

3. Pasteis de nata from Manteigaria. Trust me on this one 😊
ya
yes to all of it!! I just checked the weather and Lisbon in June looks perfect. Upper 70s and sunny
hey so Tomás turns 62 on the 14th and I want to do something nice. thinking dinner at Linger, you and Marco want to come?
Yes!! We’re absolutely in, love Linger 😊 Does he know you’re planning something?
he knows we’re doing something for his birthday but not where or who’s coming. trying to keep it a little surprise
one sec
That’s sweet! What time are you thinking?
7pm. also inviting Becca, she might bring a friend so it’d be 6 of us
Perfect. Marco just confirmed he’s free. Want us to bring anything?
Yes!!
nope just yourselves! I’m ordering a cake from Azucar, that bakery on Broadway
Oh their tres leches is incredible! Ok we’ll be there. Can’t wait ❤️
that’s exactly what I’m getting! ok I’ll text you when the reservation is confirmed

Hey Ana! Been thinking about your trip. For a special dinner, there’s a fado place called Clube de Fado in Alfama. Great food and the music starts around 9pm. Would be perfect for an anniversary dinner!

How’s the budget looking? Let me know if you need help with anything ❤️
picked our seats on the plane today! Window and middle because I know Tomás will want to look out the window. Also bought travel insurance last week so we’re all set. Checking things off one by one
got the reservation! Linger, Feb 14, 7pm, party of 6. Becca is in too
Yay! We’ll be there. This is going to be so fun ❤️
Getting ready! Is it dressy or casual?
nice casual. we always dress up a little for Linger but nothing crazy
ok perfect
Ok perfect. See you at 7! 🎉
sí hermana
hey can we talk at 3? found some hotel upgrade options I want to go over
thanks
Yes! I also found that fado restaurant in Alfama with the amazing reviews. Sending you the link during our call 😊
Talk soon
perfect. trying to decide between the room with the terrace or saving the $40/night
Ooh terrace sounds dreamy! Let’s talk it through. Calling at 3
Ok I’m officially obsessed with that fado place. The reviews are incredible! Book it for the first night
right?? the photos of the food looked amazing. I love that its a real old spot in Alfama not some tourist trap
got it
And the terrace room at the hotel? Do it, Ana. It’s your 35th anniversary, you guys deserve to treat yourselves ❤️
ok pulling the trigger on the upgrade tonight. I’ll send you the confirmations
Yes!! Tomás is going to love that view
ok so heads up, Tomás asked me about the Pilar calls on the calendar last night
Oh no! What happened??
nothing bad, he was just looking at the calendar for date night planning and noticed how often we talk now. asked what all the calls were about
What did you tell him??
just catching up, sister stuff. he totally bought it. but can we be more careful about when we schedule these? like not when he’s home looking at the shared calendar
Of course! I’m so sorry, I didn’t even think about the shared calendar. Weekday afternoons when he’s at work?
yeah thats way better. or just text me first and I can check if coast is clear lol
Ha! Covert operations 😊 I’ll text before calling from now on. Love you hermana ❤️
sintra day trip is booked!! June 15, full day tour with Pena Palace and Cabo da Roca. I am so excited for him to see that

He’s going to love it! Bring a jacket for Cabo da Roca though, it gets windy even in summer. The views are incredible.

I’m so happy for you two hermana 😊
fado restaurant is booked! Clube de Fado, June 13 at 8pm. Thank you for the recommendation
Yes!! He’s going to cry, you know that right? 😊 Have you figured out how you’re going to tell him?
just picked up my new passport! Another thing checked off. I think I’m going to tell him on our actual anniversary, maybe put the boarding passes in a card
Tía, do you remember how Abuela made her mole? The dark one with the chocolate?
do you remember which chiles? I want to try making it
Si. The dark one. She used chocolate de mesa and many chiles.
thats what I was afraid of. ok what about the tamales? the chicken ones she made at Christmas
Guajillo and ancho for sure. Maybe pasilla. Your abuela never wrote it down mija.
I have time on the weekends. what goes in the masa?
thanks
The tamales take all day mija. You start the masa the night before.
I’m going to try it this weekend. Tomás said he’d taste test
Masa harina, lard, chicken broth. A handful of salt. She never measured.
noted! piloncillo it is
Bueno.
Good. Use piloncillo not brown sugar. That is the difference.
ok I’ll email Eduardo. thanks Tía
I DONT REMEMBER THE CHILES for the pozole. Maybe guajillo. Ask your cousin Eduardo he might know.
hey Tía, do you remember Abuela’s arroz con leche? Pilar used to love that one
perfect thank you. I’m going to try a version with oat milk and see if it works
Si. Cinnamon sticks, not powder. Whole milk. She simmered it a long time.
Your abuela would not approve. But try it.

Mijita, I need to tell you something. Pilar called me today and we were talking about family and I almost said something about the recipes. I caught myself but she said I seemed like I was hiding something. She might ask you about it. I’m sorry! I’ll be more careful.
ok so Mueller this weekend. We should get the gear together tonight because I wont have time Friday after work
k
Already on it, mi vida. I pulled the tent and sleeping bags out of the closet. Do we need to stop for firewood on the way up?
Love you. -T
yes good call. we can grab some at that gas station in Woodland Park
also I checked the weather, highs in the low 50s and clear skies. perfect camping weather
That sounds wonderful. I’ve been looking forward to this all week. Last camping trip before the cold really hits.
Linda said she can watch Luna this weekend, dropping her off tonight
Perfect. Luna will be fine, she likes Linda. Make sure you leave enough of the grain-free food.
already packed a bag with her food, treats, and the little blanket she likes
Yes.
that hike today was incredible. my legs are going to be so sore tomorrow
Best views of the trip. That overlook at the top of Outlook Ridge was something else. Worth every step.
the aspens were perfect too. I got so many photos
hey can you grab cat food on the way home? we’re almost out of the grain free one
Of course. The salmon one she likes? King Soopers or the one on Federal?
king soopers is fine, and yes the salmon grain free. thanks
Got it. Anything else while I’m there?
nutritional yeast if they have it, I’m out
I’ll look. See you at home.
Dropping the car off at Midas, can you pick me up at 8:30?
I’ll be there. The one on Federal right?
Will do.
Yes.
yes on S Federal, the one we always go to
Ok I’ll head over after I drop off some work orders. See you at 8:30.
car is done! oil change, tire rotation, brake check. $127
That’s reasonable. Everything look ok with the brakes?
yep they said brakes are in good shape, all fluids topped off
Good to hear. That civic has been solid.
Pilar called the house phone, wants to know if we’re bringing the vegan chili to Thanksgiving or something else this year.
See you soon.
haha
definitely the chili, everyone expects it now. but I was also thinking of testing one of Abuela’s recipes
That would be nice. Which one are you thinking?
maybe the tres leches. or tamales but those are a whole production
Tres leches would be perfect. Save the tamales for a weekend when we can do it together. I’ll help.
found one called applewood plumbing, 4.7 stars and they can come thursday morning
Thursday works. I have to be at the facility by 6 that day so I’ll already be gone.
yep already texted Dr Reyna, she said I can come in late thursday
calling them now
booked! dec 11 at 830am
Good. I’ll clear out under the sink tonight so they have room to work.
Will do.
On my way.
thanks ❤️
plumber just got here
Good luck. Let me know what they find.
all done! it was grease buildup way down the line, he snaked it out. draining perfect now
That’s a relief. How much did it end up being?
Not bad at all. Glad it wasn’t something worse, corazón.
can you pick up piloncillo and guajillo chiles on the way home? Testing tamales tonight
lol
Piloncillo and guajillo chiles. I’ll check the Mexican grocery on Federal first, they usually have the good stuff. Anything else?
corn husks too if they have them. and maybe some masa harina
nope
Got it. I’m excited to taste-test. Abuela’s tamales were something special.
ok these tamales are NOT as good as Abuela’s but they’re decent for a first try
Corazón, they were delicious. The masa was a little dry but the filling was perfect. You’ll get it next time.
you’re just being nice but thank you. Tía Rosa said more broth in the masa next time
Merry Christmas, mi vida. ❤️
merry christmas! Luna is already playing with the ribbon from the presents
She’s been eyeing that ribbon since last night. I’m making coffee, want some?
yes please. merry christmas to us, another year together
Thirty-four years. Wouldn’t trade a single one.
hey did you see the email from the landlord today
No, I haven’t checked today. Cornerstone?
yeah. lease renewal notice, our lease is up march 31
they want to raise the rent $75 a month
Oye, $75? That puts us at $1,725. That’s a big jump on top of everything else. Between the student loan and trying to start the Roth IRA this year, I don’t know where another $900 a year comes from.
I know, I’ve been doing the math in my head all day at work
we just got to a point where we have a little cushion each month and this eats most of it
ty
Exactly. And moving would cost us even more between a new deposit, movers, and all the hassle. We’ve been there six years, you’d think they’d want to keep good tenants. Did they give us any options?
1 year lease at 1725, month to month at 1775, or vacate by march 31
Month to month is even worse. I’d rather stay if we can make the numbers work. What are you thinking?
same, I dont want to move
what if I email them back and try to negotiate
I think that’s smart. What would you propose?
offer a 2 year lease commitment if they keep the increase smaller, like $30 or $35. they save on turnover and vacancy, we save money each month
sure
That’s a really good angle, mi vida. Two years of guaranteed tenancy is worth something to them. I’d start at $30 and see where they come back. Worst case they meet us somewhere in between.
See you soon.
thats what I was thinking
ok I’ll write something up this weekend and send it monday
Good plan. Let me look it over before you send it, if you want a second pair of eyes.
will do, thanks
ok dinner is almost ready are you coming down
cool
On my way. What are we having?
tofu stir fry, that new recipe I found
Sounds wonderful. Be right there.
Yes.

Oye mi vida, I was looking at the calendar trying to find a Saturday for date night and I noticed you have Pilar calls almost every week now. You two have been talking a lot lately! Is everything ok? I was hoping we could do this Saturday evening, it’s been too long since we had a proper night out just the two of us.
haha yes everything is totally fine! we’ve just been catching up a lot lately. you know how sisters are, we get on the phone and talk about everything. family stuff, recipes, random things
Saturday evening absolutely works though. the call is always in the afternoon so we’d be totally free for dinner
That’s good to hear. I just noticed the calendar filling up and wanted to make sure. How about that new Italian place on Platte Street? I’ve been wanting to try it.
ooh yes! I saw their menu online, they have mushroom ravioli and a whole vegan section
lol
Perfect. I’ll call them tomorrow at lunch and make a reservation. Seven o’clock work for you?
7 is great 😊
It’s a date, corazón. I’m looking forward to it.
me too honestly. we really are overdue
Also I already fed Luna, she was sitting by her bowl giving me that look she does.
lol that cat is SO dramatic
She gets it from someone in this house. I won’t say who.
hey so I invited Becca over Saturday to watch the F1 season opener with us, cool?
Of course mi vida. I was planning to watch it anyway. Should I make something?
yes! your nachos maybe? I’ll make the black bean dip and Becca is bringing guac
Nachos it is. I’ll pick up chips and jalapeños at King Soopers on the way home Friday. Do we still have salsa?
Got it.
theres one jar left, maybe grab another just in case
Will do. What time is the race? I can never keep track of the schedule.
11 but I want everything ready by 10:30 so we dont miss the grid walk
Sounds good corazón. I’ll have everything ready.
this season is going to be so good
Got the chips, jalapeños, and extra salsa. Also picked up that queso fresco you like.
perfect! making the dip tonight so it can sit
Anything else we need for tomorrow?
nope I think we’re good!
Oye, random question. Pilar just texted me asking if my passport is still current. Why would she need to know that?? lol
hey Linda! are you around this weekend? we’re doing one last camping trip before it gets too cold
Hi Ana! Yes I’m home all weekend. Do you need me to watch Luna?
yes if you don’t mind! Saturday morning through Sunday evening. I’ll bring over her food and everything
Of course, I love having her! She’s such a sweet cat.
you’re the best. I’ll drop her off Friday evening with all her stuff
Sounds good! Have fun camping 😊
dropping Luna off in about 20 min, she’s in a mood today lol
Ha! I have treats ready for her. Door’s unlocked, just come on in.
Ok! She just ate so she might be sleepy. See you soon!
hey how’s Luna doing? we’re having a great time up here
lol that sounds about right. we’ll be back tomorrow evening, probably around 6
She’s doing great! Spent most of the day in the sunny spot on my couch. Very spoiled.
No rush! She’s welcome as long as you need.
on our way back, be there in about an hour to get Luna
ok what time again tonight? 7?
yes
ok potluck planning time!! 🎄
ya
np
yes! lets do it. I already started an Airtable for sign ups and secret santa
omg of course u did 😂😂
queen of spreadsheets
someone has to be organized around here! $20 limit for secret santa right?
ya $20 is good. r u making the vegan chili again? pls say yes
lol
obviously. its basically required at this point
ok good bc tyler asked me yesterday if u were making it 😂
also can i sign up for bringing cookies or is someone already doing dessert
cookies are all yours. I’ll put you down
POTLUCK DAY 🎉🎉🎉
chili is in the crockpot and smelling amazing
i jsut burned my first batch of cookies 😂 making more rn
oh no! you have time though, we don’t eat until noon
thanks
ya theyll be fine. c u at work!!
yes! Linger at 7. dont be late this time lol
THAT WAS ONE TIME 😂😂😂
lmaooo
I’m kidding. oh and don’t mention the anniversary thing in front of Tomás ok??
duh im not gonna spoil it!! ur secret is safe w me 🙊
omg yes
thank you. ok see you tonight!
hey signed up for that infection control CE in March. you doing it too?
omg yes i was literally jsut looking at it
the one at emily griffith right??
yep two Saturdays in March. Reyna is reimbursing the $85
oh nice ok im signing up rn. we can grab lunch after 😊
yes perfect!
lmaooo
omg did you see that email from Reyna about the new sterilization protocol
YES 👀👀
three pages of new steps. I need another coffee just reading it
one sec
honestly tho some of it makes sense
fr fr
ya
like teh new autoclave logging
true the old system was a mess. still, thats a lot of changes at once
at least we have teh CE course coming up to learn it all
silver lining ✨
ha true. ok heading to lunch, want anything from that pho place on Federal?
omg yes get me the veggie pho plsss 🙏
got it. large?
obviously 😂
ur the best
so how did ur tournament match go last weekend 👀
we won!! moved to quarter finals. our DPS is insane
omgggg ana the gaming queen 👑👑
lmaooo
lol stop. don’t tell anyone at work tho, I don’t need Reyna knowing I’m up til 10:30 on practice nights
my lips r sealed 🤐
IM SO EXCITED FOR TOMORROW
me too!! Tomás is making nachos and I made the bean dip already
ty
bringing the guac like i promised 🥑
perfect. 10:30 at our place so we don’t miss the grid walk
ill be there!! this season is gonna be so good
that race was INSANE
I know!! the last 10 laps were unreal
also tomas's nachos were 🔥🔥🔥
got it
sure
I’ll tell him you said that, he’ll be so proud
omw

Hey random thought. Remember back in October when you were super off for like two weeks? You barely ate at lunch, you were checking your phone constantly, and you seemed really anxious. I almost asked you about it then but didn’t want to pry. Is everything ok? It just kind of stuck with me
omg yes
Ana?? is this still your number? its Marisol from UNC!
MARISOL omg yes its me!! how are you
so good! we should get coffee sometime, are you still in Denver?
hi Dave, got your number from our neighbor Karen. looking for a quote on fence repair, about 20 feet of panel on the south side
Hi Ana, I can come take a look Thursday or Friday morning. Which works better?
hey Eduardo its Ana. Tia Rosa said you might remember which chiles Abuela used in her pozole?
hey prima! hmm I think guajillo and maybe arbol? its been so long tho
ok that helps, thanks!
Hey Ana! Missed you at the pool this week, everything ok?
hey! yeah just a crazy week at work. back to normal next week
hey Miguel, is your mom around? tried calling but no answer
She went to the store with my wife. I'll tell her to call you when she gets back
Hi Ana, a package of yours got delivered to my place by mistake
oh! yes I was expecting that, I'll come grab it
No rush, already set it on your porch :)
heads up trash pickup moved to Thursday this week
again??
holiday schedule
k
yeah city website confirms Thursday and Friday this week
did anyone else just lose power
k
yes
yep
same here. xcel says estimated restore 8pm
yeah ours too
who left their lunch in the break room fridge from like 2 weeks ago
wasnt me
fr fr
ok that might be mine sorry. cleaning it out today
lol its growing things
k
ok
reminder holiday potluck sign up sheet is on the front desk!!
omg yes
already signed up
lol
thats bc ur the only organized one here
Wash Park sunday 7am? forecast says 45 and clear
im in
k
same
see you there
yep
lake loop, 5k ish. dress warm

GEICO: Your auto policy payment of $118.00 has been processed on 2/15. Thank you.

Your King Soopers order is ready for pickup! Pull into the designated spot and check in on the app.
on my way
internet has been out for 20 min, is there an outage in 80223?
We are aware of a service disruption in your area. Estimated restoration: 10:00 PM MT. We apologize for the inconvenience.
Service has been restored in your area. Thank you for your patience.
Denver Water: Your account has a balance of $55.00 due 11/18. Pay online at denverwater.org
Hi Ana, your Honda Civic is due for service. Call us at 303-555-9400 to schedule. -Midas S Federal Blvd
thanks I'll call to schedule
Capital One: You earned $24.50 in cash back rewards this quarter. Redeem anytime at capitalone.com/rewards
Natural Grocers: This week 20% off all organic produce + BOGO bulk nuts and seeds. Visit your local store!
Your DoorDash order from City O' City is on its way! Estimated delivery: 7:45 PM
Your order has been delivered. Enjoy your meal!
Hey Ana! Are we still doing board games at your place New Years Eve?
k
No worries if plans changed, just trying to figure out the night
Hola Ana! Its Gloria from Sacred Heart. Saw Pilar last week and she said you are doing well. Would love to catch up sometime, been thinking about your family
team welcome to the chat. bracket drops monday.
lfg
hyped
we're seed 14 of 32
who do we play first
TBD monday
wp early
round 1 vs PixelPunchers, sat 8pm
ez
they have a smurf rein i swear
i'll vod review tonight
ana goat
lol
practice tue 8pm everyone in?
in
in
in
tonight focus = dive comp
kiriko or brig?
kiriko
k
im on tracer
winston for me
qp warmup first?
yep 30 min
tomorrow 8pm. don't be late
wont
bringing snacks ig
lol
GG
GG
that was clean
one more round next week
round 2 sat at 8 again
noted
tue practice. focus = ult tracking
ok
fr its bad
ill call shots
ty
GG everyone!! That was intense but we pulled it off. Round of 16 done
Ana your Kiriko was insane that last round. Those heals kept us alive
Fr fr. Quarterfinals next week, let's keep this energy going
carried
team effort
QF practice tue+thu both 8pm
in
in
thu maybe late, work thing
lmk by mon

Hey team - quarterfinal bracket just dropped. We play NightOwl Brigade this Saturday at 8pm. Ana I need to confirm the full roster with the organizer by tomorrow morning, you're still in right? Can't field 4 people
yes in
in
in

Hey team, quarterfinal bracket just dropped. We play NightOwl Brigade this Saturday at 8pm. Ana I need to confirm the full roster with the organizer by tomorrow morning, you’re still in right? Can’t do this without our healer
yo Jay just dropped the bracket lol
we got NightOwl Brigade round 1. those guys camp objectives hard
btw I been watching tape, their tank dives our backline second wave every time
same
I think if you peel left and I body block we burn their dive in 4 seconds
yep that works. ill flex zen for sustain
practice tonight?
yep 8pm. cant go past 1030 tho, work morning
same. 2 hrs is plenty if we focus on second point
gg today
that last team fight was nuts
ya I had 0 cooldowns left lmao
ok quarters Saturday. you good for early warm up at 7?
cant do morning, my husband and I have a thing. ill be on at 730 to warm up tho
all good. lock in 730. lets close this out
